authorities.title: Resident rights
authorities.short_reason: Comprehensive resident rights: dignity, self-determination, access, information, participation in care, financial rights, visitation, privacy, grievances, notification of changes.

authorities.title: Freedom from abuse, neglect, and exploitation
authorities.short_reason: Prohibits abuse, neglect, exploitation, and misappropriation; requires reporting, investigation, and prevention policies.

authorities.title: Admission, transfer, and discharge rights
authorities.short_reason: Governs admission policies, equal access by pay source, transfer/discharge criteria, notice requirements, appeal rights, bed hold, discharge planning, and discharge summary.

authorities.title: Resident assessment
authorities.short_reason: Requires comprehensive, accurate, standardized, reproducible assessment (MDS) of each resident's functional capacity on admission and periodically.

authorities.title: Comprehensive person-centered care planning
authorities.short_reason: Requires baseline care plan within 48 hours; comprehensive person-centered care plan developed with resident/representative participation.

authorities.title: Quality of life
authorities.short_reason: Requires facility to promote and enhance quality of life, dignity, and self-determination; includes activities requirements.

authorities.title: Quality of care
authorities.short_reason: Requires each resident to receive highest practicable physical/mental/psychosocial well-being; covers ADLs, pressure ulcers, hydration, nutrition, accidents, range of motion, urinary incontinence, catheters, restraints, pain, hospice.

authorities.title: Physician services
authorities.short_reason: Requires physician supervision, regular visits, delegation to NPPs, and 24-hour emergency availability.

authorities.title: Nursing services
authorities.short_reason: Requires sufficient competent nursing staff 24 hrs/day, licensed nurse as charge nurse each tour, RN 8 hrs/7 days/week, full-time DON.

authorities.title: Behavioral health services
authorities.short_reason: Requires behavioral health services to attain/maintain highest practicable mental/psychosocial well-being; medically related social services.

authorities.title: Pharmacy services
authorities.short_reason: Governs medication regimen review, labeling/storage, medication error rates, unnecessary drugs including antipsychotics, PRN use.

authorities.title: Dental services
authorities.short_reason: Requires routine and emergency dental services; denture care.

authorities.title: Food and nutrition services
authorities.short_reason: Requires nutritious meals meeting dietary needs, therapeutic diets, snacks, dining assistance, hydration, and food choices; requires qualified dietary staff.

authorities.title: Specialized rehabilitative services
authorities.short_reason: Requires provision or arrangement of specialized rehab services (PT, OT, speech-language) by qualified persons per physician order.

authorities.title: Administration
authorities.short_reason: Governs facility administration, staff qualifications, use of outside resources, medical director responsibilities, transfer agreements, record keeping, and disclosure of ownership.

authorities.title: Infection control
authorities.short_reason: Requires infection prevention and control program, antibiotic stewardship, COVID-19 vaccination requirements.

authorities.title: Physical environment
authorities.short_reason: Requires safe, functional, sanitary, comfortable environment including room dimensions, resident call systems, dining/activity rooms, and safe/homelike environment.

authorities.title: Establishment of the Office of the State Long-Term Care Ombudsman
authorities.short_reason: Establishes Ombudsman office structure, full-time requirement, qualifications, and operational policies covering access, disclosure, conflicts of interest, and designation of representatives.

authorities.title: Functions and responsibilities of the State Long-Term Care Ombudsman
authorities.short_reason: Defines Ombudsman functions: identify/investigate/resolve complaints; represent residents before agencies; systems advocacy; coordinate with agencies; manage records and disclosure authority.

authorities.title: Duties of the representatives of the Office
authorities.short_reason: Governs representative complaint processing duties: consent requirements, resident participation, disclosure rules, referral without consent in abuse/neglect cases.

authorities.title: Conflicts of interest
authorities.short_reason: Requires identification and removal of organizational and individual conflicts of interest in the Ombudsman program.

authorities.title: Connecticut Statutes — Office of the Long Term Care Ombudsman
authorities.short_reason: Connecticut statutory authority for the Long-Term Care Ombudsman program, including establishment, functions, access rights, and resident protections.

authorities.title: Connecticut Regulations — Office of the Long Term Care Ombudsman
authorities.short_reason: Connecticut state regulations implementing the LTCOP, including operational requirements for ombudsman representatives.

authorities.title: Connecticut DPH Nursing Home State Regulations
authorities.short_reason: Connecticut state regulations for nursing home facilities, supplementing federal 42 CFR Part 483 requirements.

authorities.title: Connecticut General Assembly Nursing Home Statutes
authorities.short_reason: Connecticut nursing home statutory requirements including resident rights and facility obligations.

authorities.title: AN ACT CONCERNING NURSING HOME STAFFING LEVELS
authorities.short_reason: Requires each nursing home to calculate and publicly post daily nurse and nurse aide staffing levels.

authorities.title: Resident Rights/Exercise of Rights
authorities.short_reason: Surveyors cite F550 for resident rights and exercise of rights under 42 CFR §483.10(a)-(b).

authorities.title: Rights Exercised by Representative
authorities.short_reason: Rights exercised by resident representative under 42 CFR §483.10(b)(1)(i).

authorities.title: Right to be Informed/Make Treatment Decisions
authorities.short_reason: Right to be informed and make treatment decisions under 42 CFR §483.10(c).

authorities.title: Right to Participate in Planning Care
authorities.short_reason: Right to participate in care planning under 42 CFR §483.10(c)(2).

authorities.title: Right to Choose/Be Informed of Attending Physician
authorities.short_reason: Resident right to choose attending physician under 42 CFR §483.10(d).

authorities.title: Respect, Dignity/Right to have Personal Property
authorities.short_reason: Dignity and personal property rights under 42 CFR §483.10(e).

authorities.title: Reasonable Accommodations of Needs/Preferences
authorities.short_reason: Reasonable accommodation of resident needs and preferences under 42 CFR §483.10(e)(3).

authorities.title: Choose/Be Notified of Room/Roommate Change
authorities.short_reason: Resident right to be notified of room or roommate changes under 42 CFR §483.10(e)(6).

authorities.title: Right to Refuse Certain Transfers
authorities.short_reason: Resident right to refuse certain transfers under 42 CFR §483.10(e)(7).

authorities.title: Self Determination
authorities.short_reason: Self-determination rights under 42 CFR §483.10(f).

authorities.title: Immediate Access to Resident
authorities.short_reason: Facility must provide immediate access to resident by ombudsman, state representatives, and others under 42 CFR §483.10(f)(4)(i).

authorities.title: Right to Receive/Deny Visitors
authorities.short_reason: Resident right to receive or deny visitors under 42 CFR §483.10(f)(4).

authorities.title: Resident Right to Visitors
authorities.short_reason: Visitor rights including justice-involved individuals under 42 CFR §483.10(f)(4)(vi).

authorities.title: Resident/Family Group and Response
authorities.short_reason: Resident and family group rights and facility response requirements under 42 CFR §483.10(f)(5).

authorities.title: Notice of Rights and Rules
authorities.short_reason: Required notice of rights and services to resident on admission under 42 CFR §483.10(g)(16).

authorities.title: Right to Access/Purchase Copies of Records
authorities.short_reason: Right to access and purchase copies of medical records under 42 CFR §483.10(g)(2).

authorities.title: Required Notices and Contact Information
authorities.short_reason: Required notices including ombudsman contact info under 42 CFR §483.10(g)(4).

authorities.title: Right to Forms of Communication with Privacy
authorities.short_reason: Right to private communication under 42 CFR §483.10(g)(8).

authorities.title: Request/Refuse/Discontinue Treatment; Formulate Advance Directive
authorities.short_reason: Right to refuse treatment and formulate advance directives under 42 CFR §483.10(c)(6).

authorities.title: Notify of Changes (Injury/Decline/Room, Etc.)
authorities.short_reason: Notification of resident/representative of changes in condition, treatment, or room under 42 CFR §483.10(g)(14).

authorities.title: Personal Privacy/Confidentiality of Records
authorities.short_reason: Privacy and confidentiality of records under 42 CFR §483.10(h).

authorities.title: Grievances
authorities.short_reason: Grievance process requirements and resident right to file grievances under 42 CFR §483.10(j).

authorities.title: Free from Abuse and Neglect
authorities.short_reason: Core tag for freedom from abuse and neglect under 42 CFR §483.12.

authorities.title: Free from Misappropriation/Exploitation
authorities.short_reason: Freedom from misappropriation and exploitation under 42 CFR §483.12(a)(1).

authorities.title: Free from Involuntary Seclusion
authorities.short_reason: Freedom from involuntary seclusion under 42 CFR §483.12(a)(1).

authorities.title: Right to be Free from Physical Restraints
authorities.short_reason: Freedom from physical restraints under 42 CFR §483.12(a)(2).

authorities.title: Right to be Free from Chemical Restraints
authorities.short_reason: Freedom from chemical restraints under 42 CFR §483.12(a)(2).

authorities.title: Develop/Implement Abuse/Neglect Policies
authorities.short_reason: Required abuse/neglect prevention and response policies under 42 CFR §483.12(b).

authorities.title: Reporting of Alleged Violations
authorities.short_reason: Required reporting of alleged violations to appropriate authorities under 42 CFR §483.12(c)(1).

authorities.title: Admissions Policy
authorities.short_reason: Admissions policy requirements under 42 CFR §483.15(a).

authorities.title: Equal Practices Regardless of Payment Source
authorities.short_reason: Equal practices regardless of payment source under 42 CFR §483.15(a)(3).

authorities.title: Transfer and Discharge Requirements
authorities.short_reason: Transfer and discharge requirements including permitted reasons and notice under 42 CFR §483.15(c). NOTE: F622-F625 were relocated to F627 or F628 in Nov 2024 Appendix PP revision.

authorities.title: Transfer and Discharge — Additional Requirements
authorities.short_reason: Additional transfer and discharge requirements under 42 CFR §483.15(c) — bed hold, readmission, discharge planning. NOTE: Consolidated from F624/F625/F626 in Nov 2024 revision.

authorities.title: Baseline Care Plan
authorities.short_reason: Baseline care plan within 48 hours of admission under 42 CFR §483.21(a).

authorities.title: Develop/Implement Comprehensive Care Plan
authorities.short_reason: Comprehensive person-centered care plan requirements under 42 CFR §483.21(b).

authorities.title: Discharge Planning Process
authorities.short_reason: Discharge planning process requirements under 42 CFR §483.21(c).

authorities.title: Quality of Life
authorities.short_reason: Core tag for quality of life under 42 CFR §483.24.

authorities.title: Activities Meet Interest/Needs of Each Resident
authorities.short_reason: Activities to meet interest and needs of each resident under 42 CFR §483.24(c).

authorities.title: Quality of Care
authorities.short_reason: Core tag for quality of care under 42 CFR §483.25.

authorities.title: Treatment/Services to Prevent/Heal Pressure Ulcers
authorities.short_reason: Pressure ulcer prevention and treatment under 42 CFR §483.25(b).

authorities.title: Free of Accident Hazards/Supervision/Devices
authorities.short_reason: Freedom from accident hazards and adequate supervision under 42 CFR §483.25(d).

authorities.title: Nutrition/Hydration Status Maintenance
authorities.short_reason: Maintenance of nutrition and hydration status under 42 CFR §483.25(g).

authorities.title: Bedrails
authorities.short_reason: Bedrail requirements and restraint considerations under 42 CFR §483.25(n).

authorities.title: Sufficient Nursing Staff
authorities.short_reason: Sufficient nursing staff 24 hrs/day under 42 CFR §483.35(a).

authorities.title: Provision of Medically Related Social Services
authorities.short_reason: Medically related social services under 42 CFR §483.40(d).

authorities.title: Pharmacy Services/Procedures/Pharmacist/Records
authorities.short_reason: Pharmacy services and medication regimen review under 42 CFR §483.45(a)-(c).

authorities.title: Free from Unnecessary Psychotropic Meds/PRN Use
authorities.short_reason: Freedom from unnecessary psychotropic medications and inappropriate PRN use under 42 CFR §483.45(e)-(f). Updated Aug 2024.

authorities.title: Provided Diet Meets Needs of Each Resident
authorities.short_reason: Diet meets needs of each resident under 42 CFR §483.60(a).

authorities.title: Provide/Obtain Specialized Rehab Services
authorities.short_reason: Provision/arrangement of specialized rehabilitative services under 42 CFR §483.65(a).

authorities.title: Administration
authorities.short_reason: Overall administration requirements under 42 CFR §483.70.

authorities.title: Infection Prevention and Control
authorities.short_reason: Infection prevention and control program requirements under 42 CFR §483.80.

authorities.title: Safe/Functional/Sanitary/Comfortable Environment
authorities.short_reason: Safe, functional, sanitary, and comfortable environment under 42 CFR §483.90(i).
